title: Course on Advocate on Record (AOR) exam preparation by Bettering Results: Register Now!
description: Every year, thousands of advocates attempt the Advocate-on-Record (AOR) examination conducted by the Supreme Court of India. However, only a small fraction clear it.Becoming an AOR gives advocates the exclusive right to file and conduct matters independently before the Supreme Court is a milestone for any litigation career.About AOR exam and Supreme Court practice course by Bettering ResultsTo help serious aspirants prepare effectively, Bettering Results has launched a structured 3-Month On
